description: Schedule preventive maintenance for the 5 highest-criticality chillers within the next available MaintenanceWindow, minimizing total downtime.
There are 12 open work orders and 3 maintenance windows this month. Assign work orders to windows to minimize total cost while respecting crew_size constraints.
Pump PMP-105 and Pump PMP-106 share a system. Can their maintenance be bundled into a single window to reduce repeated shutdowns?
Generate a Pareto-optimal set of maintenance schedules trading off total cost versus maximum equipment downtime for Q2 2026.
A spare part SP-2210 (compressor gasket set) has a 14-day lead time and only 2 units in stock. Which pending work orders require this part, and can they all be completed before stock runs out?
